name: ProgressBar
description: PROPOSED contract extracted from examples/astryx/.astryx-sandbox/node_modules/@astryxdesign/core/src/ProgressBar/ProgressBar.tsx (react-tsx adapter) — API surface only; anatomy, tokens, and design bindings await reconciliation and human review.

props.name: value
props.description:
Current value of the progress bar.
Ignored when `isIndeterminate` is true.

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum value of the progress bar.

props.name: label
props.description:
Accessible label for the progress bar. Required for a11y.
Shown visually above the bar unless `isLabelHidden` is true.

props.name: isLabelHidden
props.description: When true, the label is visually hidden but remains accessible to screen readers.

props.name: hasValueLabel
props.description:
When true, displays the formatted value (e.g. "75%") next to the label.
Ignored when `isIndeterminate` is true.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style variant mapped to semantic color tokens.

props.name: isIndeterminate
props.description:
When true, renders an animated indeterminate progress indicator.
Use when the progress amount is unknown (e.g. loading, processing).
The `value` and `hasValueLabel` props are ignored in this mode.
Respects `prefers-reduced-motion` by slowing the animation.

props.name: isDisabled
props.description:
When true, the progress bar is visually disabled — the fill bar and
text use disabled colors. Use for canceled or inactive operations.
